Landing.hero_subtitle: The easiest way to organize tournaments, generate fixtures, and track standings. No spreadsheet required.
Landing.features_subtitle: Stop wrestling with complicated tools. LeagueFlow gives you powerful features kept simple.
Landing.feature_1_desc: Generate Round Robin schedules with one click. Handle odd numbers of teams automatically.
Landing.feature_2_desc: Table updates automatically as you enter scores. Points, goal difference, and rankings calculated instantly.
Landing.feature_3_desc: Share read-only links with fans and players instantly. No login required for viewers.
Landing.pricing_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your tournament needs.
Landing.tier_free_desc: For small tournaments and friendly leagues.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro_desc: Welcome to LeagueFlow. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
PrivacyPolicy.data_technical: Technical Data (IP address, browser type, cookies)
PrivacyPolicy.data_usage: Usage Data (How you use our website)
PrivacyPolicy.how_use_desc: We use your data to provide our services, manage tournaments, process payments, and improve user experience.
PrivacyPolicy.cookies_desc: We use cookies to distinguish you from other users. You can control cookie preferences in our settings.
PrivacyPolicy.retention_desc: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes we collected it for, including for the purposes of satisfying any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements.
PrivacyPolicy.rights_desc: Under the Thailand Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA), you have rights including access, copy, rectification, erasure, and objection to processing of your data. You may exercise these rights at any time.
PrivacyPolicy.security_desc: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed.
PrivacyPolicy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us via the in-app Feedback system.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.acceptance_desc: By accessing or using LeagueFlow, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
TermsOfService.service_desc: LeagueFlow provides tournament management tools for organizers. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.
TermsOfService.accounts_desc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
TermsOfService.content_desc: User-generated content (tournament names, team names) must not be illegal, obscene, or threatening.
TermsOfService.payments_desc: Upgrades are effective immediately after payment. We generally do not provide refunds for services already rendered, unless required by law.
TermsOfService.ip_desc: LeagueFlow, its logos, software, and content are the exclusive property of LeagueFlow. You may not use them without our written permission.
TermsOfService.liability_desc: We are not liable for any damages arising out of your use or inability to use our services, to the fullest extent permitted by law.
TermsOfService.termination_desc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or engage in conduct that harms the platform.
TermsOfService.law_desc: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Thailand.
TermsOfService.accuracy_desc: Tournament Organizers are solely responsible for the accuracy of scores, rankings, and schedules. LeagueFlow is a management tool and does not verify the results entered by users.
TermsOfService.fair_play_desc: You agree not to use LeagueFlow for illegal gambling, betting, or the creation of fraudulent tournament results. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these principles.
TermsOfService.availability_desc: While we strive for maximum uptime, LeagueFlow is not liable for service interruptions, server downtime, or internet outages that may occur during live tournament events.
TermsOfService.comm_desc: By using the platform, you consent to receive electronic communications regarding tournament updates, administrative notices, and service-related information.

RefundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
RefundPolicy.subscription_desc: You may cancel your Monthly or Yearly subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period.
RefundPolicy.eligibility_desc: We generally do not offer refunds for partial subscription periods. However, exceptions may be made in cases of technical failure or billing errors.
RefundPolicy.tournament_desc: Purchases for Lifetime Tournament Access are generally non-refundable once the tournament has started or matches have been generated.
RefundPolicy.contact_desc: If you have any questions about refunds or believe you were charged in error, please contact our support team through the Feedback system.

Home.title: LeagueFlow Results
Home.subtitle: Browse and search for tournament results from all over the world.
Home.no_results: No tournaments found matching your search.
Home.organize_title: Want to organize your own tournament?
Home.organize_desc: LeagueFlow provides everything you need to manage leagues, tournaments, and teams with ease.
